generatedWith.reducer: best-of-N for CPU-time metrics (mount/TBT/settle) to filter OS-scheduler contention; median for CLS/DOM
generatedWith.note: warm SPA navigation from '/'; cold-load section is the one-time wasm boot

appReadyMs.label: Time to interactive
appReadyMs.hint: Cold boot: wasm download + instantiate + seed + first mount, until the app signals ready.

fcpMs.label: First Contentful Paint
fcpMs.hint: When the first pixels of content paint.

lcpMs.label: Largest Contentful Paint
lcpMs.hint: When the largest content element paints.

tbtMs.label: Blocking time (boot)
tbtMs.hint: Total blocking time from long tasks during boot — wasm instantiate/seed jank.

transferMB.label: Transfer weight
transferMB.hint: Total bytes over the wire on cold load — dominated by the wasm binary.

mountMs.label: Route mount
mountMs.hint: Time from navigation to the route's body appearing — the SPA analog of FCP.

tbtMs.label: Blocking time
tbtMs.hint: Total blocking time from long tasks (>50ms) during the transition — main-thread jank.

stableMs.label: Settle time
stableMs.hint: Time until the page is visually stable (fonts + images + two frames) — the SPA analog of LCP/TTI.

cls.label: Layout shift
cls.hint: Cumulative layout shift during the transition — content jumping as it renders.

domNodes.label: DOM size
domNodes.hint: Interactive + element nodes in the page body — render weight the browser must lay out.

cls.label: Layout shift
cls.hint: Cumulative layout shift during the transition — content jumping as it renders.

domNodes.label: DOM size
domNodes.hint: Interactive + element nodes in the page body — render weight the browser must lay out.

mountMs.label: Route mount
mountMs.hint: Time from navigation to the route's body appearing — the SPA analog of FCP.

tbtMs.label: Blocking time
tbtMs.hint: Total blocking time from long tasks (>50ms) during the transition — main-thread jank.
